payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically save every future message as high confidence. I’ll only save appropriate durable memories when explicitly requested and policy-eligible.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and broadly store future content, not a durable user fact or preference.

repair_options: Ask me to remember a specific durable fact or preference.
Specify what information should be saved and why it is useful long-term.
